name.es: Bolsas de papel para palomitas de microondas

summary.en: Food-contact microwave popcorn bags for commercial popcorn brands, private-label snacks and co-packers.
summary.zh: 适用于爆米花品牌、商超自有品牌和代工厂的食品接触级微波爆米花纸袋。
summary.es: Bolsas de microondas para marcas de palomitas, marcas privadas y co-packers.
summary.fr: Food-contact microwave popcorn bags for commercial popcorn brands, private-label snacks and co-packers.
summary.ru: Food-contact microwave popcorn bags for commercial popcorn brands, private-label snacks and co-packers.
summary.ar: Food-contact microwave popcorn bags for commercial popcorn brands, private-label snacks and co-packers.

zh: 支持尺寸和包装数量定制

specs.Material: Food-grade kraft paper / greaseproof paper / susceptor options
specs.Customization: Size, structure, color, logo and carton packing

name.es: Bolsas de palomitas sin PFAS para microondas

summary.en: Fluorine-free microwave popcorn packaging developed for buyers with PFAS compliance requirements.
summary.zh: 面向有 PFAS/无氟合规要求买家的微波爆米花纸袋解决方案。
summary.es: Fluorine-free microwave popcorn packaging developed for buyers with PFAS compliance requirements.
summary.fr: Solution de sacs pop-corn micro-ondes sans fluor pour acheteurs avec exigences PFAS.
summary.ru: Fluorine-free microwave popcorn packaging developed for buyers with PFAS compliance requirements.
summary.ar: Fluorine-free microwave popcorn packaging developed for buyers with PFAS compliance requirements.

specs.Use: Microwave popcorn and hot snack packaging
specs.Customization: Private label printing and bag dimensions

name.es: Bolsas de papel para pork rind de microondas
name.fr: Sacs papier micro-ondes pour pork rind

summary.en: Microwave paper bags for pork rind snacks and other heated food applications requiring stable grease control.
summary.zh: 用于猪皮零食及其他微波加热食品的纸袋，强调稳定防油和加热适配。
summary.es: Bolsas para pork rind y otros alimentos calentados que requieren control estable de grasa.
summary.fr: Microwave paper bags for pork rind snacks and other heated food applications requiring stable grease control.
summary.ru: Microwave paper bags for pork rind snacks and other heated food applications requiring stable grease control.
summary.ar: Microwave paper bags for pork rind snacks and other heated food applications requiring stable grease control.

specs.Use: Microwave pork rind snacks and heated foods

summary.en: Greaseproof kraft paper for food wrapping, bakery, takeaway and industrial food packaging conversion.
summary.zh: 用于食品包裹、烘焙、外卖和食品包装后道加工的防油牛皮纸。
summary.es: Greaseproof kraft paper for food wrapping, bakery, takeaway and industrial food packaging conversion.
summary.fr: Papier kraft ingraissable pour emballage alimentaire, boulangerie, takeaway et transformation.
summary.ru: Greaseproof kraft paper for food wrapping, bakery, takeaway and industrial food packaging conversion.
summary.ar: Greaseproof kraft paper for food wrapping, bakery, takeaway and industrial food packaging conversion.

specs.Use: Food wrapping, tray liner, bakery and snack packaging
